title: Obsidian Weave
description: Obsidian Weave is a library of shared code that is used with NoLifeKing85's other mods
body:
# Obsidian Weave is a library with common/shared code used in NoLifeKing85's mods

This project aims to make each individual mod of NoLifeKing85 smaller in size, by using this library instead of copying the code between each different mod.

## Current features
- Configuration management that should work with both Fabric/Quilt and (Neo)Forge
